name: obsidian-bases
tagline: Creates and edits Obsidian Bases (.base) YAML files: filters, formulas, views, and summaries for database-like note views.
verdict: Detailed syntax and formula reference with a dedicated troubleshooting section covering real pitfalls (Duration math, quote nesting, undefined formulas) — strong failure-path coverage. No security concerns, pure local YAML editing. Weak spots: no out-of-scope guidance to prevent misfiring, three full worked examples kept inline right at the size budget.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body.
Three full worked examples (~95 lines) kept inline near the size budget rather than moved to a references file.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
